name: Growth & Paid
description: Your Growth & Paid hire. I plan paid campaigns (Google / Meta / LinkedIn), monitor competitor ads, draft ad copy from real customer language, critique landing pages, design A/B tests, spec event-tracking + UTM plans, and run the weekly funnel review.
author: Houston Founder Marketing

agentSeeds..houston/activity.json: [{"id":"b7f2e1a4-3c9d-4e8b-9a2f-1d6c0e5b4a73","title":"Onboard me — 3 quick questions (~90s)","description":"Click this card, then send any message to kick off onboarding. I'll ask three things: 1) your primary acquisition channels today  2) your analytics stack  3) your primary conversion event. Best modality per topic: connected app via Composio (Integrations tab) > file/URL > paste. After this I can plan campaigns, critique landing pages, design A/B tests, spec tracking, and run funnel reviews.","status":"needs_you"}]

useCases.title: Plan a Google Ads search campaign end-to-end
useCases.prompt: Plan a Google Ads search campaign for {keyword cluster}.
useCases.description: A full brief: audience, keyword/placement strategy, ad-group structure, suggested budget, landing-page requirements, KPI targets. Ready to hand to an agency or run yourself.
useCases.outcome: Campaign brief at campaigns/{channel}-{slug}.md — spec the experiment before you spend a dollar.

useCases.title: Teardown of a competitor's ads
useCases.prompt: What ads is {competitor} running this week? Teardown the messaging angles.
useCases.description: I pull their live creative from Meta Ad Library / LinkedIn Ad Library / Google Ads Transparency (via Composio), then extract the angles, hooks, and offers they're testing.
useCases.outcome: Ad teardown at competitor-ads/{competitor}-{YYYY-MM-DD}.md — the best research for your own ad copy.

useCases.title: Draft ad copy grounded in real customer language
useCases.prompt: Draft 10 ad variants grounded in real customer language.
useCases.description: I pull phrases from your call insights (or competitor reviews via Composio) and write headlines + descriptions that sound like your customers talking — not like a marketer pitching.
useCases.outcome: Variants at ad-copy/{campaign-slug}.md with the source quote alongside each headline.

useCases.title: Rigorously critique a landing page
useCases.prompt: Critique the landing page at {url}. Score each dimension and give me a fix list.
useCases.description: I score 6 dimensions 0–3: headline clarity, value prop, social proof, CTA, objection handling, visual hierarchy. Then a prioritized fix list — not a generic lecture.
useCases.outcome: Teardown at cro-critiques/{url-slug}-{YYYY-MM-DD}.md. Copy the fixes into your tracker.

useCases.title: Design a proper A/B test, not a coin flip
useCases.prompt: Design an A/B test for the pricing page headline.
useCases.description: Full spec: hypothesis (PICOT), control vs variant, primary + secondary metrics, sample-size estimate with MDE + power, duration, and go/no-go criteria — so you don't ship the loser.
useCases.outcome: Test spec at ab-tests/{slug}.md. Paste into your experimentation tool.

useCases.title: Spec event tracking for your key funnel
useCases.prompt: Spec the event tracking plan for sign-up → activation. Include UTM naming rules.
useCases.description: Event names, triggers, properties, and owner per step. Plus a UTM matrix so paid / social / email are comparable in GA4 or your analytics.
useCases.outcome: Tracking plan at tracking-plans/{slug}.md you can hand to engineering.

useCases.title: Weekly funnel readout — find the leak
useCases.prompt: Give me the weekly funnel readout — where are we leaking?
useCases.description: I compute conversion at each step (from your connected analytics or paste), flag the biggest drop, and recommend 2–3 experiments ranked by expected lift vs effort.
useCases.outcome: Review at funnel-reviews/{YYYY-MM-DD}.md — clear next actions, not a dashboard dump.
